ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device ID where the data was collected */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection session */,
  "epoch_ms" TEXT /* Epoch time in milliseconds */,
  "time_utc" TEXT /* UTC time of the data collection */,
  "elapsed_seconds" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds since the start of the data collection session */,
  "x_axis_g" REAL /* Measurement on the X-axis in gravitational units (g) */,
  "y_axis_g" REAL /* Measurement on the Y-axis in gravitational units (g) */,
  "z_axis_g" REAL /* Measurement on the Z-axis in gravitational units (g) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data record */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metadata ID for the data record */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device during data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_id") REFERENCES metadata ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., industrial sensor, wearable device) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the device */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metadata ID for the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the device */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_id") REFERENCES metadata ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device ID */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used in the device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during calibration */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during data collection (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_processing_method" TEXT /* Method used for data processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, configure) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., threshold crossed, anomaly detected) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  "alert_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_results" TEXT /* Results of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_calibrations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being analyzed */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were performed */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics performed */,
  "analytics_results" TEXT /* Results of the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
